body_txt: Whenever technology misbehaves, restarting or power cycling it usually solves the problem. This is Truth in Television , as explained here . Asking users to restart their devices is certainly easier than actually fixing things. Boring, but Practical . Futile Control Fiddling may lead to this question. See also Cut the Juice , the slightly more direct approach. Not to be confused with a Soft Reset . Various Game-Breaking Bugs that freeze a game or otherwise cause problems can be overcome by restarting the system you're playing it on. Just keep in mind that this may set you back by rolling back unsaved progress. Compare Read the Freaking Manual .
